title: Bump Builder image ComfyUI core to v0.26.0 (parity with the global v0.26 bump)
description: FOLLOW-UP to MPI-139 (global ComfyUI v0.25.1→v0.26.0 bump). The Builder authoring image (mpi-ci/cubric-vision-builder/Dockerfile, ARG COMFYUI_REF=eca4757…=v0.25.1) must move to v0.26.0 (commit f6c162ddcfbd7eefb39c06fe5b8d4c46e8d09f40) so workflows authored on the Builder match the app/Pod core. DEFERRED by the user — may not use the Builder soon, so not in the v0.9.0 batch. When picked up: bump COMFYUI_REF in cubric-vision-builder/Dockerfile, rebuild the Builder image (cu130, LOCAL-only — overflows CI), re-run install_nodes.sh, confirm the node set + LTX workflow load on 0.26. Edit mpi-ci with `git -C c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci` (separate repo). Keep kornia 0.8.2 pin. BRANCH: RunPod / mpi-ci only.
